package rulecoverage

func PositiveSyncMutexForAtomicCounter() string {
    ruleID := "sync_mutex_for_atomic_counter"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`mu.Lock(); count++; mu.Unlock()` for simple integer counters"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
